implementation_summary: A portrait-oriented 2D tower defense playable where the user drags a weapon unit from a bottom UI panel onto a designated slot on their castle. Once placed, the unit automatically fires projectiles at the enemy castle. The enemy castle fires back automatically. The game ends when either castle's health reaches zero.

screen.responsive_strategy: Scale-to-fit (object-fit: contain or canvas scaling) centered in the viewport, ensuring the bottom UI and both castles remain visible.

gameplay.objective: Destroy the enemy castle before the player's castle is destroyed.
gameplay.primary_interaction: Drag and drop a unit card from the bottom UI onto a valid slot on the player's castle.

entities.behavior: Stationary at the bottom-left. Has a health bar. Contains a visual 'drop zone' slot for the player to place a unit.
Stationary at the top-right. Has a health bar. Automatically spawns enemy projectiles aimed at the player castle on a fixed timer.
Starts in the bottom UI. Draggable. When dropped on the player castle's drop zone, it snaps into place and begins auto-firing projectiles at the enemy castle.
Spawns from the deployed unit, travels in an arc or straight line to the enemy castle, reduces enemy health on impact, and triggers a particle/shake effect.
Spawns from the enemy castle, travels to the player castle, reduces player health on impact.

asset_plan.processing: Scale and crop to fill the portrait canvas.
Scale down to fit bottom-left quadrant.
Scale down to fit top-right quadrant.

asset_plan.use: Draggable unit icon and deployed turret sprite
asset_plan.processing: Use as the primary deployable unit to avoid PSB conversion issues in browser.
Base64 encode into the HTML file.

interaction_flow.system_response: Show a pulsing hand cursor prompting the user to drag the weapon from the bottom UI to the glowing slot on the Blue Castle. Enemy castle begins firing slowly to create urgency.

interaction_flow.player_action: Pointer down and drag on the weapon card
interaction_flow.system_response: Weapon sprite follows the pointer. Tutorial hand disappears.

interaction_flow.player_action: Pointer up over the Blue Castle slot
interaction_flow.system_response: Weapon snaps to the slot. Bottom UI card is grayed out or disappears. Weapon immediately fires its first projectile.
Deployed weapon fires every X seconds. Projectiles hit castles, updating health bars and triggering screen shake/flash.
When a health bar hits 0, the losing castle fades/explodes. Show 'Download Now' CTA overlay.

parameters.name: player_fire_rate_ms
parameters.gameplay_effect: Determines how fast the player deals damage after deployment.

parameters.name: player_damage_per_hit
parameters.gameplay_effect: Determines how many hits are required to win (e.g., 20 means 5 hits to destroy 100 health).

parameters.name: enemy_damage_per_hit
parameters.gameplay_effect: Determines how quickly the player loses if they don't deploy fast enough.

acceptance_criteria: Must be a single HTML file with no external dependencies.
All required image and audio assets must be base64 encoded inline.
Total file size must be under 5 MB.
Must run smoothly at 60fps on mobile browsers.
Drag and drop must work with both mouse and touch events.
Health bars must accurately reflect current health and trigger the end state at 0.
non_goals_v1: Parsing or rendering .psb (Photoshop Big) files in the browser (use PNG weapons instead).
Complex physics-based destruction or rigid body simulations.
Multiple unit types or a scrolling unit menu.
